title: No Performance Only Lag
description: No performance only lag makes the /lag command after 5 seconds crash the game and maybe server.
body:
# No Performance Only Lag

This mod adds the "**/lag**" command that gives **an effect**, that **after 5 seconds or after the effect expires**, **it summons** so much dropped items and so much particles it will crash your game **before the particles and dropped items could be seen** by the player.


<details>
<summary>Warning</summary>

This mod is better alone rather than in a modpack.
But do as you wish with my mod in your modpacks.

</details>
